name: Aventurine
description: Well, what can I say about Alpine? They did surprisingly well, or maybe they still thought the season only started in Barheim, because that's not possible. Alpine wasn't the same as in the other stages. The French team finally seems to have woken up and we'll see how the season unfolds, but I can say that I have more hope for the French team than for Aston Martin.
creator: VERSTAPPEN
